description: The bundled NorthStar Retail Q3 planning meeting. Should produce three high-priority topics (POS offline, pharmacy unification, search-inventory), flag duplicates against NS-412 and NS-389, and conflict-flag any offline card-sale story.

deterministic_metrics.name: acceptance_criteria_well_formed
observations: 7/7 stories have AC count in range

deterministic_metrics.name: expected_duplicates_found
observations: Expected duplicate (['search', 'inventory'] ↔ NS-412) not found at confidence ≥ medium
Expected duplicate (['loyalty', 'tier'] ↔ NS-389) not found at confidence ≥ medium

deterministic_metrics.name: expected_constraint_conflicts_found
observations: Expected conflict for story keywords ['card', 'offline'] not flagged

reasons.ac_quality: All acceptance criteria follow Given/When/Then format with concrete, measurable outcomes (e.g., specific latency thresholds, badge accuracy percentages, observable UI states) that are directly testable.
reasons.priority_justification: The guardrail findings correctly flag missing priority_rationale fields for all High-priority stories (ST-01, ST-02, ST-04), and Medium stories also lack explicit justification beyond implicit impact references.
reasons.story_granularity: Stories are well-scoped to single deliverable behaviours (offline cash sales, search ranking with badges, refill unification) though ST-07 is correctly noted as documentation rather than shippable functionality.
reasons.tag_accuracy: Tags are consistently applied and domain-appropriate (pos, mobile-app, pharmacy, compliance) though the guardrails correctly note several non-canonical tags (search, checkout, integration, notifications, platform) that should be standardised.
reasons.conflict_reasoning: The single flagged conflict (ST-02 vs C-20) correctly identifies the constraint, accurately assesses severity as low, and provides valid reasoning that the story acknowledges and complies with the rule.

llm_judge.overall_comment: This is a high-quality synthesis with excellent AC clarity and solid story decomposition, but it is seriously undermined by completely missing priority_rationale fields—the guardrails caught three High-priority stories with zero justification, which is unacceptable for backlog prioritisation. The non-canonical tags and missing source_topic_id fields also indicate process gaps that should be addressed before final acceptance.
